description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a modern industrial aesthetic, featuring a brick exterior and large rectangular windows on the front facade. The ground floor includes a black garage door and a main entryway, both framed by small planters and outdoor lighting. A wooden privacy fence encloses a side yard, which is adorned with tall palm trees and provides access to an outdoor staircase leading to the upper level. The upper floor has an open balcony area with visible interior furnishings, such as a kitchen and living space. The roof is flat, and the rear and side walls are mostly unadorned brick, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The house sits adjacent to a concrete sidewalk, integrating seamlessly into an urban streetscape.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large front windows, a garage, and a fenced side yard with palm trees and an outdoor staircase. The flat roof and open balcony give it a contemporary urban feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick facade, large windows, garage door, main entry, planters, and part of the fenced yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and a section of the sidewalk.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the brick wall, wooden fence, palm trees, and a glimpse of the open balcony and interior.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the wooden fence, outdoor staircase, palm trees, and the upper balcony area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small planters, outdoor lighting, and a garage door, all set flush with the brick facade and sidewalk.
